phase3_findings.description: split-anchor comparand routing stated as invariant/policy, not an imperative pre-dispatch detection step; no compare-time backstop for an absent recorded digest

fix_decisions.claim_text: unrecorded-comparand routing states a policy but not a pre-dispatch detection mechanism
fix_decisions.evidence: over-grade gate: single-source from silent-failure-hunter (empirical over-grader), PLAUSIBLE not CONFIRMED; 3 other reviewers (code-reviewer, pr-test-analyzer, final-pass) independently traced this exact routing and found it sound. The routing POLICY was already present and the dominant race closed, so not an Important fail-open. Calibrated to Suggestion — but applied anyway as a worthwhile hardening (making an LLM-executed contract imperative + adding a compare-time backstop) per the user directive to fix valid findings incl. suggestions.

skipped_checks.reason: working tree dirty (grades committed HEAD); arms in CI
